entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: Jelas front itu asks one idea.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Common trap itu warns against likely mistake.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Bahagian belakang yang ringkas melengkapkan idea.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Petunjuk yang membantu tanpa mendedahkan semuanya.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: A ulang kaji choice so missed cards return sooner.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: A mudah kad imbas aliran kerja

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: Lebih kuat card asks untuk recall:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Kad yang berguna bertanya satu perkara. Ia tidak sepatutnya menyembunyikan lima soalan dalam satu prompt. Ia perlu cukup khusus untuk dijawab, tetapi tidak terlalu sempit sehingga hilang makna.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: A lemah AI kad imbas says:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: pengingatan aktif

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Tambah petunjuk tanpa memberikan jawapan

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI boleh bantu jadikan kad imbas faster, tetapi pembelajaran still comes daripada retrieval. Jika alat writes cards dan pelajar never struggles untuk jawapan mereka, almost nothing mempunyai changed. berguna version turns messy notes menjadi berfokus prompt, then menjadikan pelajar recall sebelum revealing jawapan.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI boleh tukar kasar notes menjadi cleaner retrieval prompt. Ia boleh split luas ideas menjadi smaller cards, add contoh, dan kenal pasti traps pelajar mungkin miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI kad imbas dan ingatan aktif: cara ingat more

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply a konsep to a kecil contoh.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Tanya untuk one-idea cards dengan hints dan common traps.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces memory untuk reconstruct jawapan selepas some forgetting, yang mana strengthens later recall."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: bandingkan two ideas;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: define a istilah;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Delete cards itu ialah too luas atau obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Jangan ulang kaji semuanya secara sama rata

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Mudah. Push it later.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: jelaskan a cause;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Kad imbas ialah salah satu cara paling mudah untuk melakukannya.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Kad imbas ialah powerful, tetapi mereka bukan whole belajar process. Mereka ialah terbaik untuk retrieval, vocabulary, definisi, formulas, distinctions, dan key contoh. Mereka ialah weaker apabila pelajar mempunyai never understood idea dalam pertama place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Kad imbas work terbaik apabila mereka uji one idea pada time, reveal jawapan only selepas effort, dan ulang kaji missed cards sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Untuk deeper laluan, baca Pembina Kad Imbas panduan dan Pembina Kad Imbas prompt dan gelung belajar. goal bukan beautiful deck. goal ialah remembering more apabila notes ialah gone.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Sebagai contoh:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front: "Mengapa Ulang Kaji Berjarak work lebih baik than cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Sukar. Ulang kaji selepas ringkas delay.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "Fikir tentang forgetting dan retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Hints ialah berguna apabila mereka preserve effort. bad hint ialah jawapan dalam disguise. good hint narrows search space.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: kenal pasti a common kesilapan;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Jika card keeps failing, jangan only repeat ia. Tanya mengapa ia ialah sukar. Use Arahan Sokratik untuk uncover salah tanggapan, Jurulatih Langkah Matematik untuk procedural gaps, atau Pembelajaran AI prompt perpustakaan untuk find lebih baik belajar prompt.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Pembina Kad Imbas ialah designed sekitar itu ingatan aktif loop: bina deck, try front, reveal jawapan, rate anda recall, dan ulang kaji misses until idea sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. Ulang kaji soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: One mistake pelajar jadikan ialah treating every card same. Jika anda know card instantly, reviewing ia again tomorrow boleh waste time. Jika anda miss card, waiting week boleh menjadi too long.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Padankan kad imbas dengan kefahaman

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Tampal sebahagian kecil nota ke dalam Pembina Kad Imbas.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: process plants use untuk jadikan food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Rate ingatan honestly.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering mereka later ialah real uji.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: ingat a sequence;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Ulang kaji tanpa looking pada back.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Kad yang kuat sering merangkumi:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: belajar skills

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Petunjuk itu membantu pelajar bermula tanpa menghapuskan tindakan mengingat. Pembina Kad Imbas inspir direka untuk gelung dedah-dan-nilai ini: cuba dahulu, dedahkan kemudian, nilai dengan jujur, lalu bawa semula kad lemah dengan lebih cepat.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Itu ialah mengapa ingatan aktif matters. Bukannya looking pada jawapan, anda try untuk pull ia daripada memory. effort strengthens memory dan reveals apa still memerlukan work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Pelajar still mempunyai untuk lakukan remembering. Itu ialah point.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Kad kedua membuat pelajar mengingat semula hubungan, bukan sekadar mengecam ayat. Kad yang baik biasanya berfokus pada salah satu tugas ini:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Ini tidak memerlukan untuk menjadi complicated. important part ialah itu anda ulang kaji schedule responds untuk memory bukannya treating deck like static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Try ia dalam Pembina Kad Imbas. Jika anda memerlukan untuk fahami topik sebelum making cards, mula dalam Belajar Apa Sahaja. Jika anda want pressure selepas reviewing cards, move menjadi Uji Saya Dengan Trivia atau Latihan Viva.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Tukar nota menjadi kad yang lebih baik

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Tukar repeated misses menjadi soalan untuk Belajar Apa Sahaja.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Gunakan gelung ini:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Gunakan tiga penilaian:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Apakah peranan klorofil dalam fotosintesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Apa yang menjadikan kad imbas baik

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Apabila anda paste notes menjadi AI, tanya ia untuk split luas ideas menjadi itu jobs. deck dengan 18 khusus cards ialah usually lebih baik than deck dengan 5 giant cards itu each contain whole paragraph.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: Di mana AI membantu
